description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the alpine Docker image with a default interruptible timeout of 15 minutes. Define a test job that runs in the default test stage, executes a before_script that checks /etc/modules for an existing ipv6 entry and appends "ipv6" if missing, runs apk update, installs bash and gettext via apk, and then runs the script bash test_compile_po.sh. Configure the workflow to always run the pipeline. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are specified.
